channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Serious trip hazard, 7th July
item.description:
Please have this fixed ASAP before somebody breaks a leg

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Emsworth Close, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By railway Claremont road, 7th July
item.description:
Dumped chair Please start enforcing we need cctv for this hotspot of Flytipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Claremont Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Black bags dumped on Allerton Road, 7th July
item.description:
Two black bags of household waster dumped on Allerton Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lordship Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere, 7th July
item.description:
Rubbish everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapman's Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking pavement, 7th July
item.description:
As you can see the scumbag residence of this house have flight tipped a load of their rubbish onto the public highway. Please have it removed ASAP before it becomes a magnet for other scumbags to do the same

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Marys Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tenants of 1 Sennen Walk dumped their old shed on council grassed area, 7th July
item.description:
Tenants of 1 Sennen Walk dumped their old shed on council grassed area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardeners Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped doors, 7th July
item.description:
Dumped doors rear of 25 Sennen Walk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shottery Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various fly tipping next to skip on road in Solomon's passage, 7th July
item.description:
Skip has been here for at least 18 months, continually emptied but attracting various bits of flytipping such as propane tank, commercial rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Empty green cabinet often used for fly tipping, 7th July
item.description:
Is often opened and rubbish left inside. The cabinet is empty and should just be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page's Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped again, 7th July
item.description:
Every week bags of rubbish are dumped in this location. Animals or similar split open the bags and the rubbish spreads across the pavement. This is main pathway to Horizons school. Students repeatedly have to go into the road to get around the rubbish. I have a visually impaired team member and one that needs the support of a walking aid. This rubbish is dangerous. At the moment dirty nappies are strewn across the pavement. It is the same problem EVERY WEEK

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lensbury Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped builders bags, 7th July
item.description:
Dumped builders bags on footpath and road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shottery Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not at full strength, 7th July
item.description:
Rather faint
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Siward Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three gas canisters on Woodland Crescent by Fingals car park, 7th July
item.description:
Three gas canisters on Woodland crescent by Fingal’s car park.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich

item.title: Light on roundabout sign not working either, 7th July
item.description:
2 of 3 roundabout sign lights not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Godwin Road, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Light on roundabout sign not working, 7th July
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Siward Road, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish left in alley, 7th July
item.description:
Rubbish dumped in alleyway blocking the path and visual pollution

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whinchat Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncut grass & shrubs on New River Path, 7th July
item.description:
Tall shrubs and overgrown grass along the New River Path require urgent maintenance. In several areas, vegetation has encroached onto the path, restricting access, particularly for disabled users.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water coming up from pavement, 7th July
item.description:
Steady stream of water coming up from pavement drain
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 225,227, Old Street, Shoreditch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattresses dumped on pavement, 7th July
item.description:
Multiple mattresses dumped on the pavement. Another two mattresses dumped outside Tin Tabernacle.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Shrubbery overhanging pavement, 7th July
item.description:
Shrubbery is blocking the footpath at The Hollies, Oakleigh Park North, N20 9HD. (Probably too much to expect The Hollies' managing agents to maintain the property without being prompted.)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31-50, Oakleigh Park North, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
